title: How Prediction Markets and Crypto Firms Steamrolled a Watchdog Agency
summary: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission purged its ranks, dialed back its enforcement and boosted industries in which President Trump’s family is heavily invested.

title: With Big Decisions Ahead, the Supreme Court Collides With a Testy Trump
summary: President Trump has alternated between bullying the justices and cozying up to them as the court prepares to announce major decisions that will determine the fate of the key aspects of his agenda.

title: Do U.S. Automakers Have a Future in Canada?
summary: Detroit-based automakers pioneered open trade between Canada and the United States, benefiting both countries. President Trump’s trade war now leaves their future in the country in question.

title: Trump Is Setting His Sights on Restricting Legal Immigration
summary: After a year focused on immigrants here illegally, the Trump administration is now making it harder for legal migrants to stay in the country. It is a risky pivot.

title: RFK Jr.’s Push to Curb Antidepressants Has Shaken Psychiatry
summary: An annual psychiatric meeting was abuzz over Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s call to rein in the use of depression medications. Some fear it will drive patients away from care.

title: Gunman in Shooting Near White House Killed in Exchange of Fire With Secret Service
summary: A gunman known to the U.S. Secret Service opened fire near the White House and was shot and killed by federal officers. President Trump was in the White House at the time.

title: Trump Endorsement Shakes John Cornyn in Texas Senate Runoff Against Ken Paxton
summary: A tough re-election race grew more daunting after President Trump backed Mr. Cornyn’s opponent, Ken Paxton. The Texas senator has vowed to fight to the end.

title: Sanders and Ocasio-Cortez Try Boosting Progressives in Red Districts
summary: In highly competitive House races that Democrats need to flip in November, the left is betting that calls for universal health care and taxing the wealthy will resonate — even among Republicans.

title: A Deciding Factor in Congress Right Now: Who Shows Up to Vote
summary: Vacant seats, and consistently poor attendance on both sides of the aisle, have exacerbated the challenges of already razor-thin margins in the House and Senate.

title: They Started I.V.F., Then Split. Now Who Gets Custody of the Embryos?
summary: For 47-year-old Erin Millender, this will likely be her last chance to become a mother. Her husband no longer wants to have a child with her.

title: Stop Whining About Guardrails. Become One Yourself.
summary: Let’s put the sovereign back Into popular sovereignty.

title: Trump’s Slush Fund Will Reward Criminals. Americans Will Pay for It.
summary: The president’s corruption and subversion of democratic tradition risk becoming the norm.

title: Colbert’s Connection
summary: A reflection on Stephen Colbert’s relationship with his audience.

title: At Least 14 Killed in Bombing Attack That Derailed a Train in Pakistan
summary: The explosion was so powerful that several nearby buildings were damaged and a resident 15 miles away was jolted awake by the blast. A separatist group claimed responsibility.

title: Kyiv, Ukraine, Hit in Russian Missile Attack
summary: Buildings rattled in the Ukrainian capital for hours early Sunday. It was unclear if Russia’s Oreshnik intermediate-range ballistic missile had been used.

title: New York’s Rape Laws Leave Out Many Victims Who Drank Willingly
summary: Prosecutors say accusers who chose to drink or get high have a “very high burden” of proving they were physically helpless and unable to consent. There is a push to change the law.
